confirm_delete_subscription: Are you sure you want to delete this subscription?
favicon_load_failed: Could not load icon from this domain
budget_info: Set a monthly budget to track your spending against it.
household_info: Add household members to track who pays for each subscription.
exchange_rates_desc: Choose a provider for automatic currency rate updates
exchange_rates_links_desc: Where to get API access keys:
rates_key_required: API key is required for this provider
show_disabled_subscriptions_at_the_botto: Show disabled subscriptions at the bottom
language_change_desc: Do you want to translate default categories, tags, payment methods, and currencies to the new language?
language_change_hint: Custom names you've added or edited manually will also be translated if they match defaults.
export_import_info: Export your data as JSON or CSV, or import a previously exported JSON file.
import_error: Failed to import data. Invalid file format.
reset_data_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all data? This action cannot be undone.
reset_success: Data has been reset to defaults
autostart_info: Launch Subly automatically when your computer starts.
error_unexpected: Something went wrong. No further details are available.
household_keep_one_member: At least one household member is required.
category_cannot_delete: This category is in use or protected and cannot be removed.
currency_cannot_delete: You cannot remove the main currency or a currency that is still in use.
payment_method_cannot_delete: This payment method is in use and cannot be removed.
notification_sound_unavailable: Could not play the test sound.
clipboard_copy_failed: Could not copy to the clipboard.
export_path_unavailable: Could not determine a save location. Check file access permissions.
fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
save_error: Failed to save. Please check the data and try again.
add_subscriptions_to_see_calendar: Add subscriptions to see them on the calendar
get_started_info: Start by adding your first subscription to track your spending.
totp_secret_placeholder: Base32 secret, or use paste / QR
credentials_secure_hint: Stored encrypted locally; not included in cloud sync snapshots.
credentials_none_hint: No saved login, password, or 2FA. Use Edit to add them in the form.
totp_qr_invalid: Could not read TOTP QR from image
credentials_save_error: Subscription saved, but credentials could not be stored
notification_templates_info: You can mix plain text and placeholders in every title and body field. Use \{name\} for the subscription name; \{days\} for calendar days until the payment date when the app runs a check (0 means due today; for overdue alerts it is how many days late, as a positive number); \{due_date\} for the next payment date (YYYY-MM-DD); \{price\} for the amount; \{currency\} for the ISO currency code (e.g. USD or EUR). If you leave a body field empty, a built-in English default is used for that case.
notification_templates_scheduled_hint: On iOS and Android, reminders scheduled on the reminder day use your notification title and the “due soon” body template. There, \{days\} is the number of days from that reminder to the payment date; other placeholders work the same as above.
test_notification_sent_inapp: System notifications unavailable — shown in-app only
telegram_enabled_info: Send payment reminders to your Telegram chat via bot.
telegram_fill_fields: Please fill in Bot Token and Chat ID
telegram_info: Create a bot via {'@'}BotFather, get the token. Send /start to the bot, then use {'@'}userinfobot or the API to get your Chat ID.
ai_section_desc: Quick-add subscriptions and expenses with natural language, import bank statements, and scan receipts.
ai_master_enabled_info: Show AI quick-add and import buttons throughout the app.
ai_model_hint: Provider-specific identifier (e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini for OpenRouter, llama3.1:8b for Ollama).
ai_api_key_required: API key is required for this provider.
ai_endpoint_required: Endpoint URL is required for this provider.
ai_feature_subscription_input_info: Describe a subscription in plain language and the AI prefills the form.
ai_feature_expense_input_info: Type a free-form description and the AI prefills the expense form.
ai_feature_statement_import_info: Parse CSV / XLSX / PDF / JSON statements via heuristics with AI fallback.
ai_feature_receipt_import_info: Extract amount, date and merchant from a receipt photo or PDF.
ai_privacy_warning: AI features send the input data (text, file contents, images) to the selected provider. For full privacy, use a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint such as Ollama.
ai_warning_name_missing: Could not detect a name; please fill it in.
ai_warning_price_missing: Could not detect a price; please fill it in.
ai_warning_currency_unresolved: Currency was not recognised; default applied.
ai_warning_currency_substituted: Currency code is unknown to Subly; defaulted.
ai_warning_category_unresolved: Category hint did not match any existing category.
ai_warning_amount_missing: Could not detect an amount; please fill it in.
ai_import_hint: Upload a file (CSV / XLSX / JSON / PDF) or a picture (receipt photo, mobile-bank screenshot, transaction list). Subly classifies the input and lets you review every row before saving.
ai_import_supported_formats: CSV, XLSX, JSON, PDF or images (PNG / JPEG / WebP / HEIC)
ai_import_select_at_least_one: Select at least one row to import.
ai_import_empty: The file appears to be empty.
ai_import_heic_unsupported: HEIC image couldn't be decoded. Convert to JPEG or PNG.
ai_model_vision_unknown: Custom model — image support not verified.
ai_model_no_vision: The selected model does not support images. Pick a vision-capable model in Settings → AI.
ai_feature_disabled: This AI feature is turned off. Enable it in Settings → AI.
ai_provider_openai_help: Paid. Requires an API key. Best receipt quality (GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini).
ai_provider_openrouter_help: One key, access to 200+ models from many vendors. Paid.
ai_provider_gemini_help: Generous free tier from Google. Vision-capable across the family.
ai_provider_groq_help: Ultra-fast free tier with Llama 3.x and Mixtral. Text-only.
ai_provider_deepseek_help: Very low-cost API. `deepseek-chat` for general use, `deepseek-reasoner` for stronger extractions. Text-only.
ai_provider_mistral_help: Paid. Strong on European languages. Pixtral adds vision support.
ai_provider_openai_compat_help: Bring your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint — Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM. Free when self-hosted.
ai_api_key_will_replace: Press Save to replace the stored key.
ai_keychain_unavailable: Keychain is unavailable — the key wasn't persisted. If you're on a dev build, try a production build or restart the app.
ai_no_key_warning: AI is enabled, but the API key isn't configured for this provider.
recurring_notifications_info: Send reminders every day until payment, not just once.
notification_sound_info: Play a sound when a payment reminder is triggered.
notification_schedule_info: Choose when notifications are sent. 'Any' sends at each check interval.
auto_update_rates_info: Fetch rates once a day via Fixer API.
target_currencies_info: Select which currencies to update. Empty = all.
batch_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete {count} subscription(s)?
month_comparison_mtd_hint: Same calendar days: 1st through today vs the same span last month.
month_comparison_full_month_hint: Full calendar months: all expenses this month vs last month (no transactions fell in the MTD windows).
month_comparison_completed_pair_hint: Two completed calendar months: last full month vs the month before (MTD had no expenses, so the current month is not compared).
add_first_expense: Add your first expense to track spending
confirm_delete_expense: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?
cloud_sync_desc: Keep one JSON sync file (subly-sync-v1.json) in your cloud. Pick a provider, read the steps, Save credentials, then Connect. If no file exists yet, use Upload to Cloud before Download & Apply.
sync_remote_newer: A newer version of your data is available in the cloud
sync_remote_newer_desc: Another device has updated data. Do you want to download the latest version?
sync_pull_no_remote_file: No sync file in this cloud yet. On the first device tap Upload to Cloud to create subly-sync-v1.json. If you already use Subly on another device, upload from there or check cloud access.
sync_icloud_unavailable: iCloud Drive folder is not available. On iPhone: enable iCloud Drive, ensure you are signed into iCloud, then try again. Opening Files → iCloud Drive once can help the system create the folder.
sync_connected_push_hint: If this cloud is empty for Subly, use Upload to Cloud before Download & Apply. Download only loads an existing subly-sync-v1.json.
sync_no_provider: Cloud sync is not enabled. Choose a provider in Settings.
sync_push_revision_conflict: Cloud copy changed on another device.
sync_push_revision_body: The sync file in cloud storage was updated elsewhere. Download and merge your changes, or overwrite the cloud with this device.
sync_oauth_failed: Cloud sign-in was cancelled or failed. Try Connect again.
sync_setup_icloud: Uses folder Subly-v1 in iCloud Drive (macOS: ~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Subly-v1). Sign in to iCloud and enable iCloud Drive. Tap Connect (no API keys). First time: Upload to Cloud, then you can Download on other devices.
sync_setup_gdrive: Tap Connect and sign in with Google. Subly uses built-in OAuth (PKCE) with Google Drive app-folder access—you do not need your own Google Cloud project or client credentials.
sync_setup_dropbox: Dropbox App Console → Create app: Scoped access, App folder (e.g. name Subly). OAuth2 → Redirect URIs: add subly://oauth/callback. Copy App key and App secret, Save, then Connect and authorize Dropbox.
sync_setup_onedrive: Microsoft Entra (Azure) → App registrations → New registration. Authentication → Mobile and desktop applications → Redirect URI: subly://oauth/callback. API permissions → Microsoft Graph (delegated): Files.ReadWrite.AppFolder, offline_access, then Grant admin consent if your tenant requires it. Copy Application (client) ID, Save, then Connect.
sync_setup_webdav: HTTPS base URL of your WebDAV folder (no filename at the end). Subly reads/writes subly-sync-v1.json in that folder. Enter username and password if your server requires them. Use a server you trust.
sync_help_gdrive_client_id: From Google Cloud Console → Credentials → your OAuth 2.0 Client ID.
sync_help_gdrive_client_secret: Shown once when you create the OAuth client; you can reset it in the same screen.
sync_help_dropbox_app_key: App Console → your app → Settings → App key.
sync_help_dropbox_app_secret: Keep this private; Subly stores it locally for token refresh.
sync_help_onedrive_client_id: App registration → Overview → Application (client) ID. Public client / native redirect subly://oauth/callback.
sync_help_webdav_url: Folder URL where Subly may create subly-sync-v1.json (must start with http:// or https://).
sync_help_webdav_username: Usually the same login you use for the WebDAV server or Nextcloud.
sync_placeholder_webdav_password: Optional if the server allows token-only access
sync_help_webdav_password: Leave empty only if your server does not require a password for this user.
converter_empty_hint: Enable currencies with the ★ star in the rates list below to use the converter
rate_history_no_data: Not enough data for chart yet — update rates at least twice on different days
rate_history_desc: Track currency rate changes over time with sparkline charts
clear_history_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all rate history?
converter_presets_desc: Quick amount buttons for the currency converter
bulk_add_csv_hint: Paste CSV with the required header to create multiple subscriptions at once.
calendar_empty_month_hint: No subscription renewals or logged expenses on your calendar — enjoy the pause.
ai_configured_but_disabled: API key saved, but the master AI switch is off.
ai_smart_expense_hint: Type what you bought OR upload a receipt, screenshot, or statement — Subly figures out the rest. You'll review every row before saving.
ai_smart_subscription_hint: Type a service description OR drop a screenshot of your subscriptions (Google Play, App Store, Stripe). Subly classifies and previews everything before saving.
ai_smart_expense_text_placeholder: e.g. "Coffee at Starbucks 5.40 EUR yesterday, card"
ai_smart_supported_formats: CSV, XLSX, JSON, PDF, plain text, or images (PNG / JPEG / WebP / HEIC)
credentials_not_found: No saved credentials for this subscription
ai_smart_drop_here: Drop a file or image here
ai_smart_paste_hint: Tip: paste a screenshot (Cmd/Ctrl + V) right into the text field.
